title: Domestic Violence Hotlines * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Crisis Hotlines > Domestic Violence Hotlines * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Deafness Hispanic/Latino Community LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO UNICA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a crisis line for domestic violence and sexual assault. Also provides case management, survivor advocacy, housing help, support groups, parenting support, community education, and help with restraining and stalking orders. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Hispanic and Latino domestic violence and sexual assault survivors Hours: Crisis Line: 24 hours a day / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 232-4448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO UNICA
